name: gram
description: Minimal starter for personal Telegram agents on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.db:setup:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=db/schema.sql && pnpm run db:stamp:local
scripts.db:setup:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=db/schema.sql && pnpm run db:stamp:remote
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm run db:doctor:local && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm run db:doctor:remote && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote

TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Random secret used in both the webhook path and Telegram secret header. Example: openssl rand -hex 32

ALLOWED_TELEGRAM_USER_ID.description: Your numeric Telegram user ID. The bot will ignore all other users.

ALLOWED_CHAT_ID.description: Your private Telegram chat ID with the bot. In a 1:1 chat this is often the same as your user ID.

GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY.description: Google Generative AI API key used by the AI SDK provider.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key used for built-in GPT-5 series support.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key used for built-in Claude support.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key used for curated OpenRouter model support.

EXA_API_KEY.description: Exa API key used for the web_search tool.
